zh.lifeSummary: 當William Roger Trippe於大約1530年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，他的父親Robert Tripp32歲，母親Mrs. Rose Tripp27歲。他於1542年與M Nathaniel Tripp在英國素福爾可結婚。他去世於1568年在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆享年39歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Roger Trippe于大约1530年出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，他的父亲Robert Tripp32岁，母亲Mrs. Rose Tripp27岁。他于1542年与M Nathaniel Tripp在英国素福爾可结婚。他去世于1568年在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆享年39岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Trippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire and Somerset) or German: variant of   Tripp  . This form of the English name is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tripp
meanings: English: from Middle English trip(pe) (n) ‘(to) dance; stumble’ (Old French tripe(r)), either an occupational name for a dancer, or a nickname for someone who had difficulty walking.
English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English trip(e) ‘tripe’ (Old French tripe).
German: metonymic occupational name for a maker of wooden pattens (trippe), a type of raised sole that could be strapped to normal footwear for walking in unpaved muddy streets.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Roger Trippe was born about 1530, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Tripp, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Rose Tripp, was 27. He married M Nathaniel Tripp in 1542, in Suffolk, England. He died in 1568, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Roger Trippe est né environ 1530, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Tripp, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Rose Tripp, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé M Nathaniel Tripp en 1542, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1568, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Roger Trippe um 1530 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Tripp 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Rose Tripp 27. Er hat 1542 in Suffolk, England M Nathaniel Tripp geheiratet. Er starb 1568 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Lavenham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Lavenham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Roger Trippe è nato il circa 1530 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Tripp, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Rose Tripp, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato M Nathaniel Tripp nel 1542, nel Suffolk, England. Morì nel 1568, nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Roger Trippeが約1530年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Trippは32歳，母Mrs. Rose Trippは27歳であった。1542年にイギリススフォルクでM Nathaniel Trippと結婚した。彼は1568年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで39歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Roger Trippe(이)가 대략 1530년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Tripp(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Rose Tripp(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1542년 영국 수폴크에서 M Nathaniel Tripp(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1568년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Roger Trippe nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Tripp, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Rose Tripp, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com M Nathaniel Tripp em 1542, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1568, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Roger Trippe родился около 1530 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Tripp было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Rose Tripp, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени M Nathaniel Tripp в 1542 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. Он умер в 1568 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Roger Trippe nació aproximadamente 1530, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Tripp, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Rose Tripp, tenía 27 años. Se casó con M Nathaniel Tripp en 1542, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió en 1568, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
